subject: Castle of the Horned King from Disney's The Black Cauldron — a dark forbidding castle atop rocky terrain amid purple atmospheric haze and shadowy figures
suspected_ip: Castle of the Horned King (The Black Cauldron)
description: A panoramic wide view of a dark, menacing castle perched on jagged rocky terrain. The overall atmosphere is deeply gloomy — purple and dark blue haze fills the scene, and ghostly shadowed figures or skeletal silhouettes appear to populate the ground around the castle base. The castle architecture is angular and threatening, with tall pointed spires and sheer walls. The color palette is almost entirely cool shadows with faint glowing highlights, creating a bleak, evil-lair aesthetic. This is a landscape/location card rendered in horizontal orientation.
foreground: Jagged rocky terrain with shadowy creature silhouettes
background: Tall dark castle with spires against a purple-grey sky
